{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323190809AFB992ED4F6665BDB565"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7500979197471638297","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很少看到这么精致的大宋文了，大宋我最喜欢的一个时代啊！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746462998,"group_id":"7296193218801044491","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"做好自己，何必在意别人的言语！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7ESaNL0+N+SUdasiBv2egI4f6VOwb1J6znQFPCujow/","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/49863aa66df0431a9e0321a73507ef2c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788960&x-signature=WIlJwFlExKyLbX08RxZykrvG%2B5U%3D","user_id":"3078241985243102","user_name":"Mr。Z"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3078241985243102","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770306925,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7296193218801044491","book_info":{"abstract":"这一年，宋仁宗赵祯登基为帝，改国号，时值庆历元年。
这一年，能人辈出，无数能臣层出不穷，包拯，范仲淹，欧阳修，韩琦，文彦博开始崭露头角，在仁宗的麾下逐渐封侯拜相，发出自己的声音。
这一年，外敌来袭，西夏，大辽，窥视中原，虎视眈眈。
这一年，天灾人祸，赵祯连下罪己诏，祈求上天宽恕，庇佑大宋黎民百姓。
也是这一年，武子逸懵懂中醒来，他用自己的双手改变一切，孤身投入滚滚的历史洪流中，如同站在风口浪尖的弄潮者，俯瞰天下。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/53433c93689ee9fa9e64a11d4b6e2131~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"清风一梦","author_id":"","book_id":"7296193218801044491","book_name":"执掌大宋","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1376人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7298483964140850186","read_count":"1376","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2016927"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"993","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,宋朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/53433c93689ee9fa9e64a11d4b6e2131~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448089&x-signature=qNqmAL9dovaVJ6G%2BMbo9%2BItA%2Flg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"34"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323190809AFB992ED4F6665BDB565"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读60分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3599,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1052},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":
